name: org-memory
description: Org-Wide Memory: a read-only, memory-glob-bounded index and crawler over the memory each repo already commits (ADRs, CONTEXT.md glossaries, Verification Manifests, DL-### decision logs, journey/as-built docs), exposed to agents via a refuse-by-default MCP query surface — never a second store of truth (ADR 0019). Every record is a derived view carrying a {repo, commit_sha, path, source_line} back-pointer; rebuild-from-empty is always correct. Config-first repo list (installs standalone; optional host org-enumeration is vendored-under-lint, never a runtime dependency on a sibling plugin). Reuses the canonical validate_manifest toolchain (never a forked parser) and honors its 0/3/4/5 exit contract. lookup / full-text search / alias-resolution / decision-lookup over a single-file SQLite+FTS5 cache; supersession-aware; staleness disclosed, never faked. Read-only: no write-back, no remediation loop, no findings.
